component.name: Haex Vault
component.summary: Build once, run everywhere, sync automatically

description.p: Haex Vault is a cross-platform vault application that keeps your data encrypted at rest and synchronizes it automatically between your devices.
It runs on desktop and mobile, supports multiple sync backends (S3, Supabase, peer-to-peer via QUIC) and extends through pluggable vault extensions like haex-pass.
